results.rendered_html:
utsarpin (von sarp mit ud)
1〉 adj. aufsteigend, in die Höhe gehend: āsāṃ jalāsphālanatatparāṇām — śīkareṣu payodharotsarpiṣu  RAGH. 16,62 . übertr.: utsarpiṇī khalu mahatāṃ prārthanā  ŚĀK. 101,5 .
— 2〉 f. eine best. Zeitperiode bei den Jaina (s. u. avasarpiṇī)  H. 127 . 128 . 50 . 53 .

results.rendered_html:
utsarpin a.
1 Moving or gliding upwards, rising; payodharotsarpiṣu ( śīkareṣu)  R. 16. 62. 
2 Soaring, towering; utsarpiṇī khalu mahatāṃ prārthanā  Ś. 7. 
3 Transcendental.
— ṇī f. A division of time (with the Jainas), a long period said to be = ten crores of crores of oceans of year; cf. avasarpiṇī.
